rationale: Educ. Code §12.1055 governs nepotism law applicability to open-enrollment charter schools. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school is subject to a prohibition, restriction, or requirement, as applicable, imposed by state law or by a rule adopted under state law, relating to nepotism under Chapter 573, Government Code.
_note: No conflict; rule text concerns nepotism, not property tax homestead exemptions.
